title: begonia × excelsior
intro: Begonia × excelsior, also known as Begonia excelsior, is a rare and endangered species of hybrid begonia plant, typically found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Begonia × excelsior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Begonia × excelsior include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
